title: Tom's Simple Storage Knowlogy
description: Knowlogy Book addon with information about Tom's Simple Storage mod.
body:
![Tom's Simple Storage Category](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WOgHMcEV/images/e86826caa98845d494cad1df72b08c284e31f492.png)

[![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/WOgHMcEV?style=flat&logo=modrinth&label=Downloads&labelColor=03190a&color=1e1e1e)](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage-knowlogy)
[![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1162880?style=flat&logo=curseforge&label=Downloads&labelColor=241009&color=1e1e1e)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/toms-storage-knowlogy)

This is an addon mod for [Knowlogy](https://modrinth.com/mod/knowlogy) that adds [Tom's Simple Storage](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage) information to the **Book o' Knowlogy**.


## Features

### How to Make

Has recipes for crafting and links for an easy navigation.

![Inventory Connector Entry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WOgHMcEV/images/2814d7439c370dded9fc8cb47d0e69b14a4094f5.png)

### How to Use

Shows how items are used with dynamic keybinds.

![Paint Kit Entry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WOgHMcEV/images/be3b927a43a3dc2d7fa7082cd9cdfc46041757c9.png)

### How to Find

Organized in categories to find what you looking for without any troubles.

![Connection Blocks Category](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/WOgHMcEV/images/ffe601be6fd1a4e9514309a8cf6d4024a4755117.png)
